summary: Win25H2Clean reversible probe confirmed JPEGImportQuality=100 under Control Panel\\Desktop and restored the baseline.

setting.name: Wallpaper JPEG Import Quality
setting.casual_explanation: Windows can reduce the quality of JPEG images when you set them as wallpaper. People change this when they want the wallpaper to stay as sharp as possible.
setting.why_people_change_it: People set it to 100 when they notice wallpaper compression artifacts or want the imported wallpaper to match the original image quality more closely.
setting.tradeoffs_overview: Raising JPEG import quality can improve wallpaper image fidelity, but the mapping in this dataset still comes from repo research rather than a primary Microsoft registry publication.
setting.professional_notes: The repo research notes attribute JPEGImportQuality behavior to desktop wallpaper import code, saying the value defaults to 85 when missing, is clamped to a 60..100 range, and is set to 100 by the current tweak. This research pass did not capture a primary Microsoft document that publishes HKCU\Control Panel\Desktop\JPEGImportQuality as a supported control surface, so the record remains low-confidence and review-only.

allowed_values.label: Primary Microsoft mapping not captured
allowed_values.meaning: This research pass did not capture a primary Microsoft source for the exact JPEGImportQuality registry semantics.

allowed_values.label: Observed app max-quality profile
allowed_values.meaning: The current app treats 100 as the no-reduction wallpaper quality profile, based on repo observation rather than a captured primary Microsoft source.

app_current_implementation.notes: Guest-side reversible probe on Win25H2Clean confirmed the current app write and restore cycle for JPEGImportQuality.

windows_defaults.label: Conservative baseline
windows_defaults.applies_to: Systems where this dataset has not yet validated JPEGImportQuality from a primary Microsoft source

states.rationale: Do not publish a validated wallpaper-quality baseline until the exact registry mapping is backed by a primary Microsoft source.

windows_defaults.notes: This keeps the wallpaper tweak documented without overstating registry confidence.

recommended_profiles.label: Hold for research

states.rationale: Do not publish or apply the registry mapping until a primary Microsoft source is captured.

recommended_profiles.good_when: You want to document wallpaper quality behavior without overstating registry confidence.
recommended_profiles.bad_when: You need a primary-source Microsoft-backed JPEGImportQuality control.
tradeoffs: The feature area is documented honestly.
The registry mapping stays blocked from validated publication.

recommended_profiles.label: Current app profile

states.rationale: Observed app write used as the current max-quality wallpaper profile.

recommended_profiles.good_when: You are documenting what the app currently writes for wallpaper JPEG quality.
recommended_profiles.bad_when: You need a validated Microsoft registry mapping.
tradeoffs: The current app behavior is captured.
The exact registry semantics remain based on repo provenance rather than a captured primary source.
recommended_profiles.notes: Blocked until a primary Microsoft source for JPEGImportQuality is captured.

evidence.title: Repo system research notes for wallpaper JPEG import quality
evidence.summary: The repo documents JPEGImportQuality behavior, including a fallback of 85 and a clamp range of 60..100, based on code analysis rather than a primary Microsoft registry publication.

evidence.title: Current app implementation
evidence.summary: The provider writes JPEGImportQuality = 100 for the current tweak.

evidence.title: Win25H2Clean reversible probe - Wallpaper JPEG import quality
evidence.summary: Guest reversible probe toggled JPEGImportQuality to 100 and restored the missing baseline on HKCU\Control Panel\Desktop, confirming the current app write and rollback cycle.

decision.why: Win25H2Clean reversible probe confirmed JPEGImportQuality transitions through missing -> 100 -> missing on the documented Desktop path.

open_questions: Can a primary Microsoft source for JPEGImportQuality be captured?
Should this setting be treated only as an advanced wallpaper preference?

validation_proof.notes: Guest-side reversible probe on Win25H2Clean; see the batch probe output in H:\Temp\vm-tooling-staging\vm-batch-probe-20260320.json.
